round1_packet.description: Client sends g^x1 with ZKP proving knowledge of x1

point1.description: g^x1 - public key derived from random x1

point2.description: V = g^v - ZKP commitment using random v

zkp_value.description: r = v - hash(G, V, g^x1, party_id) * x1 mod n

round2_packet.description: Client sends g^x2 with ZKP proving knowledge of x2

point1.description: g^x2 - public key derived from random x2

point2.description: V = g^v - ZKP commitment using random v

zkp_value.description: r = v - hash(G, V, g^x2, party_id) * x2 mod n

round3_packet.description: Client sends A with ZKP proving knowledge of x2*s

point1.description: A = (g^x1 + g^x3 + g^x4)^(x2*s) where s is password
point1.base: sum of round1 points from both parties + remote round2 point

zkp_value.description: r = v - hash(base, V, A, party_id) * (x2*s) mod n

round3_packet.note: The password 's' is involved in both the main computation and ZKP

key_derivation.description: Derive shared secret after round 3 validation

steps.compute: pms = x4^(x2*s) where x4 is remote round2 public key
shared = B - pms where B is remote round3 point

steps.description: Hash X coordinate of shared point
